name: lightning
description: Animated WebGL lightning-bolt background with fbm-distorted glow. Drop it behind content as a full-bleed background.
descriptionParagraphs: Animated WebGL lightning-bolt background with fbm-distorted glow.
and angle through the controls panel — or use it as a static backdrop in the Framer editor.
keyFeatures: Procedural lightning glow rendered entirely on the GPU via WebGL shaders.
Smooth float and distortion loops driven by configurable speed and intensity.
Full control over bolt color
horizontal offset
size
and rotation angle.
Toggle live animation or freeze a single frame for static export.
Editor preview mode renders one frame in the Framer canvas without burning GPU cycles.
usage:
import Lightning from "./lightning"

<Lightning color="#3b5bff" speed={0.2} intensity={1} />

name: repeat-image-hover
description: Image pill that fans out into concentric echo rings on hover, then collapses back to a single filled image.
descriptionParagraphs: Repeat Image Hover stacks multiple copies of the same image and animates them into a pill-shaped echo trail.
Tune geometry, tint, and motion from the controls panel — or flip Effect On to show the trail at rest.
keyFeatures: Rests as one clean image; on hover echoed copies fan into faded concentric rings.
Configurable layer count, pill radius, front scale, and scale step.
Overlay tint, fade strength, duration, stagger, and easing curves.
Invert behaviour with Effect On: hover vs rest.
Static preview pins the expanded trail for marketplace thumbnails.

name: animatedbars
description: Single scroll-triggered progress bar with animated fill and counter.
descriptionParagraphs: A single animated progress bar that fills and counts up when scrolled into view.
keyFeatures: Scroll-triggered fill animation with animated percentage counter.
Configurable colors, bar height, radius, and duration.
Optional replay when re-entering the viewport.

name: snowfall
description: Customizable canvas snowfall with density, wind drift, flake size, opacity, and fall direction.
descriptionParagraphs: A customizable canvas snowfall: density, randomized speed, per-flake wind drift, size and opacity ranges, fall direction, colour and an optional backdrop.
Toggle Preview for live snow vs a static scene on the canvas.
keyFeatures: Canvas-rendered snowflakes with configurable density and speed ranges.
Per-flake wind drift with swaying motion and wrap-around edges.
Control flake radius, opacity, colour, and fall direction (down or up).
Optional backdrop colour with smooth transition timing.
Preview toggle for live animation vs a static canvas frame.

name: before-after-slider
description: Drag-to-reveal image comparison slider with a divider handle, click-to-jump, and keyboard control.
descriptionParagraphs: Drag the handle to reveal the two images. Click anywhere to jump the divider, or focus and use the arrow keys.
Swap before and after images, tune handle styling, and set the starting reveal position from the controls panel.
keyFeatures: Side-by-side before and after images with a draggable reveal divider.
Click anywhere on the frame to jump the handle position.
Keyboard accessible — arrow keys nudge the divider in 2% steps.
Customizable divider, handle size, colours, corner radius, and initial position.
Touch-friendly pointer events with a circular drag handle.

name: coverflow
description: 3D cover-flow image carousel with depth, rotation, and drag-to-browse.

name: light-rays
description: Animated volumetric light-ray background rendered on the GPU.

name: pixel-card
description: Card with an animated pixel-grid reveal that lights up on hover.

name: shiny-button
description: Button with an animated specular shine sweep and gradient sheen on hover.

name: text-lift
description: Headline that lifts and reveals its characters with a staggered spring on view.
